mdSummary:
# Kbd

Keyboard shortcut glyph — renders \<kbd\> with styling.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/kbd

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Kbd | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The key or shortcut label (e.g. "⌘", "Ctrl", "Esc"). |
| Kbd | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` | Size of the badge. Defaults to Md. |
| Kbd | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root kbd element. |
| Kbd | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root kbd element. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Kbd) — The key or shortcut label (e.g. "⌘", "Ctrl", "Esc").

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Kbd />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Kbd/Kbd.razor`
